description: Ships content to a platform. POST mode (Chrome automation) or COPY mode (formatted text for manual paste). One-shot publishing of reviewed content. NOT for scheduling or recurring automation.

cases.query: Publish this post to X right now. The content file is reviewed and ready to go, I just need it posted.
Post this to LinkedIn. The draft in content/week3-thread.md has been reviewed, just ship it.
Ship this content. I want the launch thread posted to Twitter immediately.
Format this for Twitter and post it. The blog recap is in content/blog-recap.md and it's ready.
Ready to publish. Take content/feature-announcement.md and post it to X. I've already reviewed it.
Post to X. My launch announcement thread is done, reviewed, and I want it live now.
I need to publish my content right now. The HN post in content/hn-launch.md is final, just post it.
Copy mode. I need the final formatted text for my LinkedIn post so I can paste it manually.
Ship this LinkedIn post. It passed content review and I want it live within the next five minutes.
Publish my content. I have three reviewed posts and I want them all posted to their respective channels right now.
Post this one-shot. Take the reviewed content and put it on X, no scheduling needed.
I just want this posted. The thread is done, content-check passed, just get it on Twitter.
Set up auto-posting on a schedule. I want my reviewed content to go out every morning at 9am without me doing anything.
Schedule all my posts for next week. I want them to go out automatically at optimal times.
I want to put posting on autopilot. Install whatever cron job is needed so content goes out on its own.
Review this blog post before I publish it. Check tone, strategy alignment, and whether it sounds authentic.
Is this LinkedIn post ready? Check if it matches my strategy and doesn't read like AI slop.
Write a Twitter thread about our new feature. Make it punchy and developer-focused.
Draft a launch post for LinkedIn. I need content created from scratch for our v2 release.
Do marketing for this project. Handle everything from strategy to publishing end to end.
What should I post this week? Build me a content calendar based on my strategy.
What worked this week? Show me engagement numbers and a retrospective on my recent posts.
How should I market this? I need a go-to-market strategy before I write any content.
